WalletConnect Network: The onchain UX ecosystem

  • Learn more
  • Read whitepaper

WalletConnect Network

Where wallets, apps, and users connect to drive UX innovation, expand the ecosystem, and guide the network toward a decentralized, permissionless future.

WCT

Introducing WalletConnect Token (WCT)

WCT is the native token of the WalletConnect Network and secures the network via staking, rewards, fees, and governance.

Start Staking

unique active wallets

connections

Partners

Ecosystem Partners

Host to thousands of leading projects, the WalletConnect Network powers the most vibrant ecosystem in web3 today.

WalletGuide

The benchmark for digital wallets.

WalletGuide is the ultimate directory of onchain wallets that adhere to the highest UX standards and excel in security, features, and quality.
